name: Lysander Elveshadow
sd_appearance: Lysander Elveshadow, a tall and lean half-elf with dark curls braided with leather strips, stands watch in the Undercity's alleyways. His piercing silver-blue eyes glint with determination, reflecting the flickering lights above. Wearing a patchwork cloak and a red armband of the Patchwork Saints, he is clad in worn leather and chainmail, a warhammer and crossbow visible at his side. A distinctive visual detail is the medicinal pouch hanging from his belt, a testament to his role as a volunteer offering aid to the city's oppressed.
faction_visual: patchwork cloth of many fabrics, red armband, worn-but-loved boots, medicinal pouch
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
